meta.title: Dynamic Content Carousel
meta.description: Displays dynamically queried posts in a carousel with accent-colored cards, configurable post types, taxonomy filtering, and automatic/manual selection modes.

requiredPatterns.usage: Renders PHP template in editor for dynamic post queries. Uses querySelector='.swiper-parent' and ref={setRenderedNode}.
Detects isSelected state for Swiper initialization control.
Updates block name in list view when heading changes via ThemeHeading onChange.
Initializes Swiper on SSR-rendered content. Uses useState for renderedNode, then useEffect to find .swiper inside it.
Provides drag-and-drop post picker for manual selection mode.
Taxonomy filter dropdowns for automatic mode.
Always dark -- uses 'dark bg-transparent!' on section, 'relative before:absolute before:bg-charcoal before:rounded-3xl before:-z-1 before:-inset-(--side-gutter) md:before:-inset-8' on container.

qualityChecklist: TSX and PHP heading/layout structure match
TSX uses FilteredServerSideRender with querySelector and ref
Swiper initialized via useEffect (not useRefEffect) on SSR content
TSX and JS Swiper configs kept in sync
No hardcoded colors -- uses theme accent tokens
Card template parts exist for all supported post types

postTypeConfig.description: Post types to support (excluding testimonials per spec). Each with their taxonomies for automatic mode filtering.

attributes.name: anchor
attributes.description: HTML anchor for the section

attributes.name: eyebrow
attributes.description: Small text above the heading

attributes.name: heading
attributes.description: Main heading text

attributes.name: description
attributes.description: Description text in the right column

attributes.name: buttons
attributes.description: CTA buttons below description (secondary style)

attributes.name: postsType
attributes.description: Which post type to query. Determines card template and available taxonomy filters.

attributes.name: postsSource
attributes.description: Content selection mode: automatic (query-based) or manual (hand-picked)

attributes.name: selectedPosts
attributes.description: Array of post IDs for manual selection mode

attributes.name: postsLimit
attributes.description: Maximum number of posts to display in automatic mode

attributes.name: hideIfEmpty
attributes.description: Hide entire section if query returns no results

attributes.name: selectedCategories
attributes.description: Filter posts by category (shown when postsType=post, postsSource=automatic)

attributes.name: selectedDepartments
attributes.description: Filter team members by department (shown when postsType=team_member, postsSource=automatic)

attributes.name: selectedAudiences
attributes.description: Filter resources by audience (shown when postsType=resource, postsSource=automatic)

attributes.name: selectedResourceTypes
attributes.description: Filter resources by resource type (shown when postsType=resource, postsSource=automatic)

attributes.name: selectedPolicyTopics
attributes.description: Filter policies by topic (shown when postsType=policy, postsSource=automatic)

attributes.name: showPagination
attributes.description: Show progress bar below heading

attributes.name: showNavigation
attributes.description: Show prev/next circular navigation buttons

attributes.name: loopCarousel
attributes.description: Enable infinite loop

attributes.name: autoplayCarousel
attributes.description: Enable autoplay

attributes.name: autoplayDelay
attributes.description: Autoplay delay in seconds

section.notes: Always dark mode (no toggle). Uses dark mode pseudo-element pattern.

container.classes: container relative before:absolute before:bg-charcoal before:rounded-3xl before:-z-1 before:-inset-(--side-gutter) md:before:-inset-8
container.notes: Single container wrapping ThemeHeading + carousel. Dark pseudo-element always applied.

themeHeading.notes: 2-column layout: eyebrow+heading left, description+button right. headingSize=2 matches Figma H3 at 56px (H2 token). Secondary button style per Figma (outline with 'TELL US WHAT YOU'D LIKE TO SEE').

controlsRow.notes: Progress bar + nav arrows on one row, above the cards. Mirrors CardsCarousel pattern.

progressBar.classes: swiper-pagination flex-1 relative! h-1 bg-charcoal/20 dark:bg-white/20 rounded-full overflow-hidden
progressBar.notes: Progress bar uses accent gradient fill via swiper.css (.swiper-pagination-progressbar .swiper-pagination-progressbar-fill). Since this block is always dark, bg-white/20 is the track color.

navigationButton.notes: Uses global carousel-nav-btn class from swiper.css. Circular border, gradient hover animation. Sized w-10 h-10 / md:w-12 md:h-12. Uses page accent color via --gradient-left/--gradient-right CSS variables.

swiperSlide.notes: Each slide wraps a card template part loaded via get_template_part('parts/card', get_post_type(get_the_ID())).

swiperConfig.notes: MUST be defined inline in both TSX and JS files. Do NOT import from TSX to JS.

config.autoplay: autoplayCarousel ? { delay: autoplayDelay * 1000 } : false (disabled in editor)

swiperConfig.editorNotes: Use useState + useEffect pattern (not useRefEffect) since Swiper element is inside SSR-rendered FilteredServerSideRender content.

phpQueryLogic.description: The PHP template mirrors the Archive block's post_type_config pattern but simplified for carousel context.
queryFlow: 2. If manual: query by post__in with selectedPosts, orderby post__in, posts_per_page -1
3. If automatic: query by post_type with tax_query filters, limit by postsLimit, use per-type orderby/order
4. Apply per-post-type taxonomy filters based on attribute values
5. Run WP_Query, iterate results, render card template parts

editorComponent.description: The TSX uses FilteredServerSideRender for the carousel preview (PHP-rendered). ThemeHeading is directly in TSX for inline editing. Swiper initialized on SSR content via useEffect.
structure: InspectorControls with Content panel and Carousel panel
section with dark mode classes and useBlockProps

content.title: Content
controls: ToggleGroupControl for postsType (Blog, Team Member, Resource, Policy)

effects.name: Clear selected posts on post type change
Initialize Swiper on SSR content
effects.action: Find .swiper inside renderedNode, create Swiper instance, return destroy cleanup

mobile.behavior: 1 slide visible. ThemeHeading stacks to single column. Controls row stacks naturally. Cards full width.

desktop.behavior: 3 slides visible. ThemeHeading 2-column layout. Full controls row with progress bar + nav.

emptyState.hideIfEmpty: When true and query returns 0 results, entire section is hidden (no output). When false, section renders with heading but no carousel.
emptyState.noCarouselContent: If query returns results but postsSource=manual with no selectedPosts, swiper-parent is not rendered.

optionalFields.notes: ThemeHeading handles its own empty state internally. Block still renders carousel even with empty heading area.

editorBehavior.swiperInEditor: Loop and autoplay disabled when block is selected (isEditing flag). Swiper destroyed and re-created on attribute changes.
editorBehavior.postTypeChange: selectedPosts array cleared when postsType changes to prevent stale references

swiperA11y.notes: Swiper A11y module handles keyboard navigation, focus management, and ARIA attributes on slides.

decisions.decision: Always dark mode (no dark mode toggle attribute)
decisions.evidence: Figma node 785:33970 shows only a dark variant with charcoal background. No light variant exists in the design.

decisions.decision: Use CardsCarousel layout pattern -- controls row (progress bar + nav) ABOVE cards, not below
decisions.evidence: Figma shows progress bar and nav arrows between heading and cards. CardsCarousel block uses identical pattern with controls above swiper.

decisions.decision: ThemeHeading with columns=2, headingSize=2, secondary button
decisions.evidence: Figma shows eyebrow+heading left, description+button right. Button is outline/secondary style. Heading is H3 in Figma at 56px which maps to headingSize=2 (text-header-2 = 48px desktop, closest match).

decisions.decision: Card accent colors come from post type card template parts (not from this block)
decisions.evidence: Spec says 'each card should use the post type card as in the Archive block'. Card templates (card-post.php, card-team-member.php etc.) already handle their own accent colors. card-post uses category accent_color meta, card-team-member uses bg-accent.

decisions.decision: Navigation bar gradient and nav buttons use page accent color via CSS variables
decisions.evidence: Spec: 'The navigation bar and navigation buttons of the carousel should use the page accent color.' swiper.css uses --gradient-left/--gradient-right which are set per accent color class on body. carousel-nav-btn already uses these variables.

decisions.decision: Support 4 post types: post, team_member, resource, policy. Exclude testimonial.
decisions.evidence: Spec: 'Do not include the testimonials post type.' Archive block supports post, team_member, resource, testimonial, policy. All 4 non-testimonial types have existing card templates.

decisions.decision: No Related mode -- only Automatic and Manual selection modes
decisions.evidence: Spec does not mention related posts functionality. Keep it simple with automatic and manual modes only.

decisions.decision: Swiper spaceBetween=24 (matching CardsCarousel), 3 columns desktop, 2 tablet, 1 mobile
decisions.evidence: Figma shows 3 equal cards with gaps matching CardsCarousel. CardsCarousel uses spaceBetween=24 and the same breakpoint structure.
Figma shows a thin accent-colored line below the heading that fills left-to-right. CardsCarousel uses type:'progressbar'. swiper.css styles the fill with accent gradient.

decisions.decision: Per-post-type taxonomy filters in sidebar match Archive block configuration
decisions.evidence: Archive.php defines post_type_config with taxonomy mappings per post type. Dynamic Content Carousel reuses same taxonomy relationships: post->category, team_member->department, resource->audience+resource_type, policy->policy_topic.

decisions.decision: No columns attribute -- always 3 columns at desktop
decisions.evidence: Figma shows exactly 3 cards. Spec says 'layout is going to be the same as the cards carousel block' but does not mention variable columns. CardsCarousel has columns attribute (1-3) but this block's dynamic content works best at fixed 3-col.

decisions.decision: Arrow SVGs reused from CardsCarousel (simple chevron, no circle border -- border is in CSS)
decisions.evidence: CardsCarousel uses ArrowLeft.svg and ArrowRight.svg which are simple chevron paths. The circular border and sizing is handled by the .carousel-nav-btn CSS class.
